MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-14-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-14-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAMANTHA BEHRMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. SAMANTHA BEHRMAN'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. THE DECLARATION MUST STATE "[T]HE MEANS BY WHICH" THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED. (CCP 430.41(A)(3)(A).).) THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JULY 12, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-14-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAMANTHA BEHRMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. SAMANTHA BEHRMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A MOTION TO STRIKE IS FILED. THE DECLARATION MUST STATE "[T]HE MEANS BY WHICH" THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED. (CCP 435.5(A)(3)(A).) THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JULY 12, 2023 JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAMANTHA BEHRMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Samantha Behrman's motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion to strike is filed. The declaration must state "[t]he means by which" the parties met and conferred. (CCP 435.5(a)(3)(A).) The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by July 12, 2023

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAMANTHA BEHRMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Samantha Behrman's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The declaration must state "[t]he means by which" the parties met and conferred. (CCP 430.41(a)(3)(A).).) The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by July 12, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
